raw.cumulativeActivity: Sum of occupied clade-ticks from simulation tick 1 through the end of each window.
raw.normalizedCumulativeActivity: Cumulative activity divided by elapsed simulation ticks at the end of each window.
raw.newActivity: Occupied clade-ticks within a window contributed by clades whose firstSeenTick falls inside that same window.

seedPanel.observedLifetime: Observed lifetime is extinctTick - firstSeenTick for extinct clades and maxTick - firstSeenTick for extant clades.
seedPanel.persistentNewActivity: Occupied clade-ticks within an origin window contributed by clades whose observed lifetime reaches the survival threshold.
seedPanel.censoredWindow: A window is censored when its end tick plus the survival threshold exceeds the simulation horizon, so late-origin clades in that window cannot yet be fully evaluated.
seedPanel.persistentWindowFraction: For one seed and threshold, the fraction of evaluable post-burn-in windows whose persistentNewActivity is greater than zero.
seedPanel.allEvaluableWindowsPositive: For one seed and threshold, true when every evaluable post-burn-in window has persistentNewActivity greater than zero.

definition.activeClades: Active clade count in the final simulation summary for one seed.
definition.activeSpecies: Active species count in the final simulation summary for one seed.
definition.totalClades: Total clades observed across the full simulation history for one seed.
definition.totalSpecies: Total species observed across the full simulation history for one seed.
definition.activeCladeToSpeciesRatio: Final activeClades divided by final activeSpecies for one seed.
definition.totalCladeToSpeciesRatio: Total clades divided by total species observed over the full simulation history for one seed.
